name: hud_ui_text_label_copy_constructor
description: HudUiTextLabel::CopyConstructor copies the HudUiElement base, installs the text-label ftable, clones the text buffer, and copies label font/alignment fields.
known_limits: Depends on HudUiElement::CopyConstructor, which is functionally accepted but still has byte-level field-copy scheduling/register-shape drift.

VC6 cl 12.00.8168 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?CopyConstructor@HudUiTextLabel@@QAEPAU1@PBU1@@Z at 0x4bcbe0 still fails: 138 unmasked mismatches, 12 relocation bytes masked, 4 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, Binary Ninja body is 157 bytes and the VC object symbol is 112 bytes. The normalized diff shows the same base copy, ftable install, strncpy, and field copies, but the retail body has EH registration/state scaffolding absent from this isolated manifest profile.
binary_safe_evidence: Binary Ninja shows a call to HudUiElement::CopyConstructor, ftable install to g_HudUiTextLabel_FTable, strncpy of 256 text bytes, and copies of fontHandle, centerText, center bounds, and alignMode.

The native text-label smoke validates copy-constructor ftable identity, cleared base links, copied base state/position, preserved destination padding, copied text buffer, font handle, center fields, and alignment.
